title: hi52 LIKIT-ONCE: liquid-universe-first hi52 under realistic cost -- Stage 0 pre-registration (3rd and FINAL hi52 measurement, N<=3)
decision_owner: the project. Harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; does NOT finalize deployment. Even a TRADEABLE-EDGE verdict is hi52's first deployable Yol-1 FORM (an overlay CANDIDATE at most -- separate the project decision). Deployment is NEVER auto-triggered.
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any D-205 edge result is computed and BEFORE any result is seen. The engine (src/screening/d205_hi52_liquid.py) REFUSES to run unless this file exists. The liquid-ADV threshold, the 5-gate adaptation, and the 2-way verdict are FROZEN here and will NOT be relaxed post-hoc (no threshold re-pick, no window/lookback widening, no factor redefinition, no lambda_kyle re-calibration, no breakeven cherry-picking). N=1 candidate (hi52 LIKIT-ONCE). MEASUREMENT-ONLY; optimization FORBIDDEN. The hi52 signal is D-203-IDENTICAL (unchanged). The buffer enter-15/exit-30 is a reported VIEW, NOT a deploy selection. REUSES the D-203 frozen panel verbatim (same content hashes) + the D-204 cost/stat geometry verbatim.
motivation: D-203 found hi52 = the system's FIRST asterisk-free GERCEK-EDGE (NW |t|=3.19, 5/5 gates). D-204 STRESS-TEST then judged the naive PROTOTYPE (252d + top-15 + EW + monthly + no-filter) tradeable-DEGIL: realized realistic round-trip ~340bp > breakeven ~302bp, root cause ~88% turnover x ~98% microcap (median-ADV 1.65M-TL). NRR-005 OBSERVATIONAL diagnosis showed (a) the killer is the COST-RATE (microcap), not the turnover-LEVEL (buffer alone did not save it), and (b) the hi52 SIGNAL lives in liquid names too (liquid-pool rank-IC 0.048 ~ full-universe 0.047 -- NOT a microcap artifact; liquid-first top-15 pre-cost +1.47%). D-205 attacks D-204's ROOT CAUSE (cost-rate): restrict the UNIVERSE to absolute-liquid names FIRST (signal UNCHANGED), then apply hi52, and ask whether the edge survives REALISTIC cost.
honest_expectation: RR-015 liquid-tier half-spread ~6.5-10bp vs micro 40bp (~4-6x cheaper) + NRR-005 signal-is-there -> the liquid-first after-cost edge MAY be positive. But this is the FINAL hi52 question (N<=3): a 'YINE-TRADEABLE-DEGIL' outcome (after-cost <= 0, or breakeven ~ cost, or universe too narrow, or any gate FAIL) is a CLEAN, VALUABLE result -- hi52 then CLOSES (real phenomenon, not retail-tradeable), CONSISTENT with the D-204 verdict (not a refutation of it). A narrow liquid universe is itself a finding, reported honestly, never forced.
does_NOT_relax_D204: D-205 does NOT relax or refute the D-204 verdict. The naive PROTOTYPE stays tradeable-DEGIL (correct). D-205 changes the UNIVERSE (liquid-first), not the prototype, and attacks D-204's documented root cause (cost-rate from microcap). The two verdicts are consistent.
basis: D-204 results docs/yol1/d204_results.json + STAGE0_d204.json (hi52 prototype GERCEK-ama-tradeable-DEGIL; ~340bp > breakeven ~302bp; ~88% turnover x ~98% microcap)
D-203 results docs/yol1/d203_results.json + STAGE0_d203.json (hi52 GERCEK-EDGE; NW t=3.19; 5/5 gates)
NRR-005 ORCH-NOTICE observational diagnosis (cost-RATE root cause + signal-lives-in-liquid; liquid-pool rank-IC 0.048 ~ full 0.047; liquid-first top-15 pre-cost +1.47%)
NRR-006 demo-3/nrr006_pool_sizes.json pool-feasibility (EDGE-UNSEEN: the basis for the FROZEN 1e7 threshold)
RR-015 docs/research/RR-015-TRANSACTION-COST.md sec.3.1 (BIST liquidity-tier half-spreads; liquid ~4-6x cheaper than micro)
hypothesis: On the D-203 frozen clean universe restricted FIRST to the absolute-liquid universe (trailing-63d-median ADV >= 1e7 TL), the hi52 top-15 EW tilt RETAINS a positive EW_FULL_LIQUID-relative net edge AFTER realistic per-stock cost (Roll + Kyle + tier), with a breakeven >= 2x realized realistic cost, the liquid-long after-cost REAL net clearing the TLREF deposit hurdle, and all 5 gates passing. NULL/expectation alternative: realistic cost still zeroes the liquid-first edge OR a gate FAILS -> hi52 CLOSES (final, N<=3).
what_this_is_NOT: NOT an optimization (the liquid-ADV threshold is FROZEN below on NRR-006 feasibility + the maintainer-deploy grounds EDGE-UNSEEN; lambda_kyle FROZEN; buffer is a VIEW). NOT a post-hoc threshold pick (post-hoc-grid FORBIDDEN; ONE threshold, frozen before edge). NOT a relaxation of D-204 (the prototype stays tradeable-DEGIL). NOT a re-measurement of the data (reuses the D-203 frozen panel + content hashes verbatim). NOT a redefinition of hi52 (D-203-IDENTICAL signal). NOT a true regime-change OOS -- the walk-forward is honest IN-SAMPLE, the 2024-26 disinflation window is a WEAK proxy; the OOS gap is stated in EVERY verdict. NOT a 4th hi52 round (D-205 is the 3rd and FINAL, N<=3).

candidate_N_lock.rule: N=1 (hi52 LIKIT-ONCE). D-205 is the 3rd and FINAL hi52 measurement (N<=3: D-203 + D-204 + D-205). No 4th round.
candidate_N_lock.candidate: hi52-liquid-first (52wk-high proximity within an absolute-ADV-liquid universe).

liquid_universe_FROZEN.definition: Liquid universe at date d = names whose trailing-63d-median daily traded value (value_tl) >= 1e7 TL.
liquid_universe_FROZEN.freeze_process: Chosen in NRR-006 ADIM-2 (the project) on pool-FEASIBILITY + the maintainer-deploy grounds, EDGE-UNSEEN. The hi52 edge was NEVER computed during threshold selection (post-hoc edge-fitting FORBIDDEN). Pool size is a physical name-count fact independent of the threshold choice; it was measured FIRST (NRR-006 ADIM-1, edge-not-measured), then the threshold was frozen, EN-SON the edge is tested (this run).

rationale_3criteria_edge_unseen.criterion_1_the maintainer_deploy_PRIORI: 20K-TL order at 1e7 ADV = ~0.08% of ADV -> impact-minimal; comfortably the maintainer-scale.
rationale_3criteria_edge_unseen.criterion_2_N15_feasibility: pool min 44 / median 78 names, top-15 feasible 100% of rebalances, healthy (>=30) 100% -> clean noiseless top-15 selection.
rationale_3criteria_edge_unseen.criterion_3_real_liquidity: median liquid-name ADV 24.9M-TL = ~15x the D-204 microcap trap (1.65M) -> well clear of the microcap cost-rate that killed the prototype.
rationale_3criteria_edge_unseen.rejected_alternatives: 2e6 deploy-cleanliness weak (median-ADV ~6.4M, still thin); 5e7+ universe too narrow (criterion-2 fails: 1e8 top-15 feasible only ~17%, 5e8 effectively dead).

liquid_universe_FROZEN.honesty_note: If the liquid universe turns out too narrow at any rebalance (top-15 infeasible, pool_size_min < 15), that is itself a D-205 result -> YINE-TRADEABLE-DEGIL, reported, not forced.

universe_REUSE.source: REUSES the D-203 frozen D-202 panel verbatim -- SAME content hashes, no re-freeze.
universe_REUSE.note: The engine asserts these hashes match on load (reproducibility guard); a mismatch RAISES.

windows_REUSE.note: Reused verbatim from D-203/D-204. Monthly cadence (D-203/204-comparable).

factor_geometry_FROZEN_REUSE.selection: select_top_n(pool=liquid) -- monotone rank, so rank-then-pool-filter == rank-within-liquid then top-15 (same 15 picks); no new ranking.

benchmark_FROZEN.primary: EW_FULL_LIQUID = equal-weight of the LIQUID universe per period (the HONEST select-edge bar: does hi52-top-15 beat just holding all liquid names EW?).
benchmark_FROZEN.context: EW_FULL = equal-weight of the entire clean universe (reported for context, reused from D-203 ew_full_benchmark).

five_gates_FROZEN.gate1_selection_null: Cost-free REAL top-15 vs a fair null drawing random-15 from the SAME liquid pool each period (fair_selection_null with pools=liquid-per-period); PASS if the strategy real-mean beats the >=95th percentile of the null (D203_GATE_NULL_PCTILE).
five_gates_FROZEN.gate2_newey_west_aftercost: NW |t| (lags=3) of the AFTER-COST EW_FULL_LIQUID-relative series >= 2.0 (D205_GATE_NW_T_MIN). STRICTER than D-203: computed after realistic cost, not cost-free.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate3_cross_regime_aftercost: regime_split at 2022-01-01 on the AFTER-COST series -> both sub-periods relative-positive.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate4_subtier_consistency: Split the liquid universe each period into upper/lower ADV half (D205_SUBTIER_SPLIT=0.5); within EACH half run hi52 top-min(15,half) vs that half's EW AFTER cost; PASS if BOTH halves relative-positive (edge not concentrated only at the very top of liquidity). the maintainer NOTE: in a narrow universe (pool <~40 names) the lower half is small -> its mean is NOISY, so a gate4-FAIL must be read ALONGSIDE the reported lower-half basket SAMPLE SIZE (min/median) -- conservative false-negative risk is accepted (deploy-caution direction), but the FAIL reading is sample-size-aware.

cost_geometry_FROZEN_REUSE_D204.model: Per-stock round-trip = 2*(Roll one-way spread + Kyle one-way impact) + commission(0). Roll (1984) close-only spread is the PRIMARY leg; the RR-015 tier half-spread is the model-independent CROSS-CHECK. Identical to D-204 (src/screening/realistic_cost.py, PORTED not imported).
cost_geometry_FROZEN_REUSE_D204.selected_picks_cost_summary: Reports mean Roll-leg round-trip + roll-zero share AMONG the names hi52-liquid actually trades (compare to the D-204 microcap ~340bp / roll-zero 51.9% -- the model-independent 'what does it cost to trade THESE picks' read).

deploy_hurdle_FROZEN_REUSE_D204.rule: The liquid-long after-cost REAL monthly net must clear the mean monthly REAL TLREF deposit/repo carry (project principle 'real > max(TUFE, TLREF)'). Returns are TUFE-deflated, so the hurdle is the real-TLREF-carry.
deploy_hurdle_FROZEN_REUSE_D204.reproducibility_guard: The engine RECOMPUTES the hurdle from the frozen TLREF + TUFE snapshots and ASSERTS |recomputed - 0.000222| <= 5e-6 (D205_DEPLOY_HURDLE_TOL), else RAISES (drift guard).

statistics_FROZEN_REUSE.note: Reused verbatim from D-203/D-204 so the measurement matches the KESIN-TEST + STRES-TEST exactly.

verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way.TRADEABLE_EDGE: ALL 5 gates PASS AND liquid-long after-cost REAL net >= the TLREF deposit hurdle AND breakeven >= 2x realistic cost AND pool_size_min >= 15 (top-15 feasible everywhere) -> hi52's FIRST deployable Yol-1 FORM (overlay CANDIDATE; deploy is a separate the project decision, NOT auto-triggered).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way.YINE_TRADEABLE_DEGIL: after-cost EW_FULL_LIQUID-relative mean <= 0 OR breakeven < 2x realistic cost OR the liquid universe is too narrow (pool_size_min < 15) OR ANY gate FAILS OR the real net is below the deposit hurdle -> hi52 CLOSES (real phenomenon but not retail-tradeable even liquid-first; clean archive, CONSISTENT with the D-204 verdict).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way.oos_gap_MANDATORY: Every verdict (both branches) attaches the explicit OOS-gap statement: the 2019-26 sample is one long high-inflation regime; a true inflation-normalization OOS is ABSENT; the walk-forward is in-sample and the 2024-26 disinflation window is only a weak proxy. Regime-change robustness is NOT proven. Deployment is a separate the project decision.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way.no_post_hoc_relaxation: the liquid-ADV threshold, the 2x safety multiple, and the gate thresholds are frozen here; not loosened after seeing results. No 4th hi52 round (N<=3 FINAL).

thresholds_reference.decision_constants: src/signals/thresholds.py D205_* block (D205_LIQUID_ADV_MIN_TL=1e7, D205_LIQUID_ADV_TRAILING_DAYS=63, D205_SUBTIER_SPLIT=0.5) + reused D204_*/D203_* (cost/hurdle/gate constants).
thresholds_reference.measurement_geometry: src/screening/d205_config.py (reuses snapshots/windows/hi52-geometry from d204_config + cost/walk-forward/disinflation/regime/deploy geometry verbatim).

tlref.note: daily TLREF return-index (D-187 frozen); first valid 2022-07 -> hurdle window 2022-07..2026-04

outputs: docs/yol1/d205_results.json (after run: liquid-universe size series + cost 3-numbers Roll/tier/breakeven + EW_FULL_LIQUID-relative edge + 5 gates + buffer VIEW + walk-forward + deploy hurdle + verdict)
docs/research/D-205-rapor.md (FINAL hi52 verdict TRADEABLE-EDGE / YINE-TRADEABLE-DEGIL; liquid-universe size; cost 3-numbers; OOS-gap explicit) + docs/RESEARCH_REGISTRY.md line
